brought on by advanced age would not be considered confined to the home for purposes 
of receiving home health services unless they meet one of the above conditions. 

Although a patient must be confined to the home to be eligible for covered home health 
services, some services cannot be provided at the patient's residence because equipment 
is required that cannot be made available there. If the services required by an individual 
involve the use of such equipment,
